passive.name: Hemorrhage
passive.description: Darius' attacks and damaging abilities cause enemies to bleed for physical damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times. Darius enrages and gains massive Attack Damage when his target reaches max stacks.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Innate:}} {{cis|Darius}} basic attacks and damaging abilities apply a stack of ''Hemorrhage'', stacking up to a cap.
wiki_detail.blurb2: '''Darius''' becomes empowered with ''{{ai|Hemorrhage 2|Darius|Noxian Might}}'' for a few seconds whenever he kills an enemy with ''{{ai|Noxian Guillotine|Darius}}'' or applies maximum stacks to an enemy {{tip|champion}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4:
{{sbc|Hemorrhage:}} Deal {{as|physical damage}} to the target over a few seconds. For each stack, this damage is increased.

{{sbc|Noxian Might:}} '''Darius''' gains {{as|{{sti|attack damage}}}} and always applies the maximum stacks of ''Hemorrhage''.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Innate:}} '''Darius' ''' damaging [[basic attack]]s and [[Champion ability|abilities]] apply a [[stack]] of ''Hemorrhage'' to enemies for 5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent applications and stacking up to 5 times.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Hemorrhage:}} For each stack, the target is dealt{{ft|{{as|{{pp|13 to 30}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 30% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''total''' physical damage}} over the duration,|{{as|{{pp|3.25 to 7.5}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ {{fd|7.5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|physical damage}} every {{fd|1.25}} seconds over the duration,}}up to a maximum of{{ft|{{as|{{pp|13*5 to 30*5}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ 150% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|'''total''' physical damage}} over the duration.|{{as|{{pp|3.25*5 to 7.5*5}}|physical damage}} {{as|(+ {{fd|37.5}}% '''bonus''' AD)}} {{as|physical damage}} with each tick.}}''Hemorrhage'' deals 300% damage against {{tip|monsters}}.
wiki_detail.description3: When '''Darius''' kills a champion with ''{{ai|Noxian Guillotine|Darius}}'', or applies 5 stacks on an enemy {{tip|champion}}, he becomes empowered with ''Noxian Might'' for 5 seconds.
wiki_detail.description4: {{sbc|Noxian Might:}} '''Darius''' gains {{pp|30 to 75 for 10;85 to 105 for 3;130 to 230 for 5|formula=30 + 5 per level until level 10, then + 10 per level until level 13, then + 25 per level|color=AD}} {{sti|{{as|'''bonus''' attack damage}}}} and instantly applies 5 ''Hemorrhage'' stacks through his usual means.
wiki_detail.notes:
* If Hemorrhage's '''total''' {{tt|post-mitigation|Damage calculated after modifiers}} damage is higher than the {{as|target's '''current''' health}}, a small area of {{tip|sight}} is granted around the target for the duration of Hemorrhage and for another 2 seconds after it ends.
* ''Hemorrhage'' does not apply to [[structures]] nor {{tip|wards}}.
* '''Darius'''' attacks and abilities have to deal damage to apply ''Hemorrhage''.
** ''Hemorrhage'' cannot be applied to/refreshed against {{tip|invulnerable}} targets.
** ''Hemorrhage'' '''can''' be applied to and refreshed against {{tip|shield|shielded}} targets.
** ''Hemorrhage'' can also be applied {{tip|on-hit}}, but will specifically not do so if the target is invulnerable.
* {{tip|Spell shield}} prevents ''Hemorrhage's'' application from abilities only.

Q.name: Decimate
Q.description: Darius winds up and swings his axe in a wide circle. Enemies struck by the blade take more damage than those struck by the handle. Darius heals based on enemy champions and large monsters hit by the blade.
Q.tooltip:
Darius hefts his axe then swings it around, dealing {{ bladedamage }} physical damage with the edge and {{ handledamage }} damage with the handle. Enemies hit with the handle do not take a Hemorrhage stack.

Darius restores {{ e5 }}% missing Health per enemy champion and large jungle monster hit with the edge, up to a max of {{ e7 }}%.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Darius}} briefly winds up to spin his axe in a circle, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to enemies hit.
wiki_detail.blurb2: When '''Darius''' hits a {{tip|champion}} with the blade, he applies a {{ai|Hemorrhage|Darius}} stack and {{tip|heals}} based on {{as|his '''missing''' health}}, multiplied by the number of champions hit up to 3.
wiki_detail.blurb3: Enemies hit by the handle receive reduced damage and do not gain a ''{{ai|Hemorrhage|Darius}}'' stack.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Darius''' hefts his axe for {{fd|0.75}} seconds, and then swings it around himself, dealing {{as|physical damage}} to nearby enemies, reduced to 35% against enemies hit by the inner radius.
wiki_detail.description2: Against champions and large monsters hit, '''Darius''' {{tip|heal|heals}} for {{as|{{sti|health|{{pp|changedisplay=true|type=number of targets hit by the outer radius|key=%|17 to 51 for 3|1;2;3+|formula=15% * number of targets hit. ''This is capped at 3 enemies.''}} of his '''missing''' health}}}}. Enemies hit by the inner radius do not refresh the duration of or gain a new stack of {{ai|Hemorrhage|Darius}}.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Darius''' is unable to declare basic attacks or cast {{ai|Apprehend|Darius}} or {{ai|Noxian Guillotine|Darius}} during Decimate.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Decimate'' will cancel if '''Darius''' enters {{tip|stasis (buff)|stasis}} or uses {{si|Dash}} during the delay.
** After the delay, ''Decimate'' will be placed on a 1-second cooldown.

W.name: Crippling Strike
W.description: Darius's next attack strikes an enemy's crucial artery. As they bleed out, their Move Speed is slowed.

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{cis|Darius}} next basic attack within a few seconds deals increased {{as|physical damage}} and {{tip|slow|slows}} the target.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the empowered attack kills the target, the cooldown is {{sti|ah|reduced}} and the {{as|{{sti|mana cost}}}} is refunded.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Darius''' empowers his next basic attack within 4 seconds to have an {{tip|uncancellable windup}}, gain {{sti|range|25 '''bonus''' range}}, deal {{as|'''bonus''' physical damage}} and {{tip|slow}} the target by 90% for 1 second. This damage is affected by {{tip|critical strike}} modifiers.
wiki_detail.description2: If this attack kills the target, half of ''Crippling Strike's'' {{sti|cooldown}} is reduced and its {{as|{{sti|mana cost}}}} is refunded.
wiki_detail.description3: ''Crippling Strike {{tip|basic attack reset|resets}} '''Darius' ''' basic attack timer.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* {{tip|Spell shield}} will not block the damage.
* The attack's animation can be cancelled by casting {{ai|Decimate|Darius}}, but the attack will still land.
* ''Crippling Strike'' will trigger {{ri|Manaflow Band}}, {{iis|Tear of the Goddess}} {{nie|Mana Charge}} and [[spell effects]].
* Despite its name, ''Crippling Strike'' does not {{tip|cripple}} [[V5.16|anymore]].

E.name: Apprehend
E.description: Darius hones his axe, passively causing his physical damage to ignore a percentage of his target's Armor. When activated, Darius sweeps up his enemies with his axe's hook and pulls them to him.
E.tooltip:
Passive: Darius gains {{ e1 }}% Armor Penetration.

Active: Darius hooks with his axe, Pulling, and Knocking Up and Slowing by {{ e2 }}% for {{ e3 }} second.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Darius''' sweeps in a cone in the target direction, {{tip|slow|slowing}} and {{tip|airborne|pulling}} enemies hit towards him.
wiki_detail.description2: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Darius''' sweeps his axe in a cone in the target direction, granting {{tip|sight}} of the area for 1 second while {{tip|airborne|pulling}} enemies hit towards him. Upon arrival, they rebound {{tt|150|Estimated}} units off of him, remaining {{tip|airborne}} and becoming {{tip|slow|slowed}} by 40% for 1 second.
wiki_detail.description3: '''''Darius''' is unable to move or cast {{ai|Decimate|Darius}} or {{ai|Noxian Guillotine|Darius}} for {{fd|0.4}} seconds after Apprehend's cast time.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* Enemies hit by ''Apprehend'' will quickly be dragged to '''Darius''' before rebounding over a longer period.
** The {{tip|slow}} duration starts as soon as the target rebounds off of '''Darius'''<!-- , meaning 50% {{tip|Tenacity}} will leave the target not slowed at all after the {{tip|airborne}} ends.
** This is disregarding stat update timing, which means that the target's movement speed may still be reduced for up-to {{fd|0.25}} seconds after the slow ends-->.
** {{pending for test}}: The rebound location is determined when the target reaches '''Darius' '''location.
** The rebound's forced movement's duration is roughly {{fd|0.5}} seconds, finishing before the {{tip|airborne}} duration ends.
** {{pending for test}}: There is no {{tip|stun}} applied for the same duration of the {{tip|airborne}}, meaning {{tip|brittle}} cannot extend the disable duration. It will not increase the {{tip|slow}} duration in most situations because of the negative tenacity falling off before the slow is applied.
* After the pull, '''Darius''' will attempt to basic attack the closest pulled target, prioritizing enemy champions.
* The armor penetration {{tip|stacks multiplicatively}} with other forms of [[Armor_penetration#Percentage_armor_penetration|percentage armor penetration]].
{{Effect at cast time end}}
{{ct|cast|spells=true,false,false,false,false}}

R.name: Noxian Guillotine
R.description: Darius leaps to an enemy champion and strikes a lethal blow, dealing true damage. This damage is increased for each stack of Hemorrhage on the target. If Noxian Guillotine is a killing blow, its cooldown is refreshed for a brief duration.
R.tooltip:
Darius leaps to an enemy and strikes a lethal blow, dealing {{ damage }} true damage. For each Hemorrhage on the target, this Ability deals an additional {{ rdamagepercentperhemostack*100 }}% damage, up to a max of {{ maximumdamage }} damage.

If this kills the target, Darius may Recast this Ability once within {{ rrecastduration }} seconds. At rank 3, this Ability has no Mana cost and kills refresh the Cooldown completely.{{ spellmodifierdescriptionappend }}

wiki_detail.blurb: {{sbc|Active:}} {{ci|Darius}} {{tip|lunge|leaps}} to an enemy champion and strikes a lethal blow, dealing {{as|true damage}} based on the target's current ''{{ai|Hemorrhage|Darius}}'' stacks.
wiki_detail.blurb2: If the target dies very briefly afterwards, ''Noxian Guillotine's'' cooldown is temporarily {{sti|ah|reset}}, and nearby {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}} are {{tip|fear|feared}} and {{tip|slow|slowed}}.
wiki_detail.blurb4: At max rank, ''Noxian Guillotine'' permanently resets its cooldown if the target dies very briefly afterwards.
wiki_detail.description: {{sbc|Active:}} '''Darius''' attempts to execute the target enemy {{tip|champion}}, {{tip|lunge|leaping}} towards them to deal {{sti|{{as|true damage}}}}, increased by {{pp|type=target's [[File:Hemorrhage.png|20px]] Hemorrhage stacks|key=%|0 to 100 by 20|0 to 5|formula=20% for every Hemorrhage stack the target has, capped at 100% at 5 stacks}}, and granting {{tip|sight}} of the area around them for {{fd|2.5}} seconds from the start of the cast time.
wiki_detail.leveling: {{st|True Damage|{{ap|125 to 375}} {{as|(+ 75% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Bonus Damage Per Stack|{{ap|125*0.2 to 375*0.2}} {{as|(+ 15% '''bonus''' AD)}}|Maximum True Damage|{{ap|125*2 to 375*2}} {{as|(+ 150% '''bonus''' AD)}}}}
wiki_detail.description2: If the target dies within {{fd|0.15}} seconds after being hit by ''Noxian Guillotine'', '''Darius''' {{tip|fear|fears}} nearby {{tip|minions}} and {{tip|monsters}} for 3 seconds, during which they are gradually {{tip|slow|slowed}} by up to 99% over the duration. He can also recast the ability within 20 seconds at no cost, which refreshes on further executions.
wiki_detail.description3: At rank 3, ''Noxian Guillotine'' has no {{sti|{{as|mana cost}}}} and recast timer.
wiki_detail.description4: '''''Darius''' is unable to cast {{ai|Decimate|Darius}} or {{ai|Apprehend|Darius}} for {{fd|0.25}} seconds after Noxian Guillotine's cast time.''
wiki_detail.notes:
* ''Noxian Guillotine's'' cooldown after the recast or recast window is calculated by taking the values at the end, and using this formula: (''Noxian Guillotine's'' Cooldown - time since first cast){{times}}100{{divided by}}(100 + {{sti|AH}}).
* ''Noxian Guillotine'' applies {{ai|Hemorrhage|Darius}} after the damage.
* '''Darius''' will only leap towards the target if it is at range, or leap backwards if it is very close.
** This leap can pass very thin terrain and will otherwise not be able to. In any case, '''Darius''' will still hit the target.
** The ability is disabled while {{tip|ground|grounded}} or {{tip|root|rooted}} even if '''Darius''' is in the range in which he does not leap.
* ''Noxian Guillotine'' will not reset nor trigger {{ai|Hemorrhage 2|Darius|Noxian Might}} if used to kill a {{tip|clone}} or a target protected by {{tip|resurrection}}.
* ''Noxian Guillotine'' will reset but not trigger {{ai|Hemorrhage 2|Darius|Noxian Might}} if it finishes off a target that is in a {{tip|zombie state}}.
{{Unit-targeted cancel conditions}}
